FOREST: Branches scrape lightly as you push out of the undergrowth, your footing suddenly steadier as a worn road emerges beneath you.
ROAD: The familiar road stretches on, its surface worn smooth by countless footsteps.
default: A worn dirt road cuts through the apple woods here, the trees pressing close on either side.

description.text: A narrow dirt road cuts through the woods, its surface worn smooth by years of travel.
Fallen apples lie crushed along the roadside, filling the air with a faintly sweet scent.
Sunlight flickers through the branches overhead.

exits.travel_text: You press onward on the dirt road, following the well-trodden path through the woods for a while.
You step off the road and into the undergrowth, branches brushing against you as the trees close in.
You press onward on the dirt road, following the well-trodden path through the woods for a while.

action.name: Pick an apple
action.tooltip: Pick an apple off the side of the road to eat.
action.disabled_tooltip: You've already picked an apple here.

default: Debug.

exits.travel_text: You press onward on the dirt road, following the well-trodden path through the woods for a while.
You press onward on the dirt road, following the well-trodden path through the woods for a while.

action.name: Test Fight
action.tooltip: Choose enemy to fight
action.disabled_tooltip: You already fought an enemy here

FOREST: The trees close in around you, swallowing the last traces of any clear path.
default: You are deep in the apple woods, surrounded by tall trees and thick undergrowth.

description.text: Tall trees crowd together, their branches knitting a dim canopy overhead.
The forest floor is thick with leaves, each step muffled.
A distant rustling echoes through the trees.

exits.travel_text: You push through the tangle of growth, the canopy thickening overhead as the forest deepens around you.
You search for a break in the undergrowth, weaving between trunks and fallen branches in hopes of finding a path.

action.name: Pick an apple
action.tooltip: Pick an apple to eat.
action.disabled_tooltip: You've already picked an apple here.

ROAD: The path ahead splits cleanly in two, each direction equally worn.
default: The road splits here, its two branches equally worn and equally uncertain.

description.text: A weathered signpost stands here, its markings long faded.
The air is still, as if waiting for your decision.

exits.travel_text: You take the left fork and follow the worn road, the other path disappearing behind you.
You veer right and press on along the road, leaving the fork behind.

action.name: Pick an apple
action.tooltip: Pick an apple off the side of the road to eat.
action.disabled_tooltip: You've already picked an apple here.

FOREST: The sound of rushing water grows louder until the trees part, revealing a wide river.
RIVER: You continue along the riverbank, the current rushing beside you.
RAPIDS: You somehow manage to grab on to one of the river banks and pull yourself out of the water.
default: A wide river runs through the woods here, its current swift and cold.

description.text: A wide river cuts through the woods, its current swift.
Sunlight glints off the moving water.
Leaves swirl along the surface.

exits.travel_text: You walk along the riverbank, the water rushing steadily beside you as you follow its course.
You wade into the current, the cold water rising to your waist. You fight across and emerge on the far bank, dripping and breathless.
You backtrack along the edge of the river, searching for a narrower crossing before pressing back into the forest.

action.name: Fish
action.tooltip: Someone left a rod wedged between the rocks. Try your luck.
action.disabled_tooltip: You already fished here.

ROAD: The road leads you to an old wooden bridge spanning the river.
RIVER: Following the river, you come upon a creaking wooden bridge.
default: An old wooden bridge spans the river here, its moss-covered planks worn smooth.

description.text: An old wooden bridge creaks softly above the rushing water.
Moss clings to the worn planks.

exits.travel_text: You leave the bridge behind and walk along the riverbank, the current rushing beside you.
You cross the creaking bridge with careful steps, the old planks flexing underfoot before you reach solid ground.

action.name: Check under the bridge
action.tooltip: Look for loot under the bridge
action.disabled_tooltip: You've already checked under the bridge

FOREST: The dense trees suddenly part, revealing an open clearing.
ROAD: The road widens into a quiet clearing.
default: A quiet clearing opens in the middle of the forest, the trees holding back at its edge.

description.text: Grass sways gently in the open space.
The air feels still here.

exits.travel_text: You leave the open clearing behind and step back into the forest, the trees quickly closing around you.

action.name: Pick an apple
action.tooltip: Pick an apple on the side of the clearing to eat.
action.disabled_tooltip: You've already picked an apple here.

FOREST: A soft trickling sound draws you toward a small spring.
RIVER: Breaking from the riverbank, you find a quiet spring nearby.
default: A small spring wells up from the earth here, its sound soft and constant.

description.text: Clear water bubbles gently from the earth.
The sound is calming.
The water is crystal-clear.

exits.travel_text: You step away from the spring and press deeper into the forest, the sound of trickling water fading behind you.

action.name: Drink from the spring
action.tooltip: Drink from the spring to recover HP and MP
action.disabled_tooltip: You already drank from the spring

FOREST: The trees begin to thin until the forest opens onto a crystal-clear lake.
RIVER: The river widens and empties into a vast, still lake.
RAPIDS: The current carries you until you wash away at the margin of a vast lake.
default: A lake of crystal-clear water stretches before you.

description.text: The surface reflects the sky like glass.
A faint ripple crosses the water.

exits.choice: Find a way around the lake
exits.travel_text: You skirt the edge of the lake, weaving through the trees until the water disappears behind you.

action.name: Fish
action.tooltip: A weathered rod leans against a driftwood log at the water's edge.
action.disabled_tooltip: The rod is in two pieces now.

FOREST: Through the trees, a lone wooden cabin comes into view.
default: A lone wooden cabin stands among the trees here, weathered but intact.

description.text: The structure creaks softly, aged but standing.

exits.travel_text: You leave the cabin standing in silence and push back into the forest, the shadows swallowing you quickly.

action.name: Enter the cabin
action.tooltip: Go into the cabin.
action.disabled_tooltip: You've already gone into the cabin.

FOREST: Something about the ground here seems disturbed.
default: A patch of recently disturbed earth marks this spot in the forest.

description.text: The soil looks recently turned.
A faint sense of possibility lingers.

exits.travel_text: You move on from the disturbed ground and press deeper into the trees.

FOREST: You come upon a dark hollow in an ancient tree — a crude camp littered with stolen goods.
default: A crude camp sits within a hollow tree. Someone is here.

description.text: The camp is occupied. There is no element of surprise.

exits.travel_text: You turn and run back into the undergrowth.

FOREST: As you traipse through the trees, the edge of the woods is starting to come into sight.
ROAD: As you follow the well-trodden path, the edge of the woods is starting to come into sight.
default: A quiet clearing opens in the middle of the forest, the trees holding back at its edge.

description.text: You feel as though as you are being watched.

exits.travel_text: You make for the edge of the Apple Woods.

TUNNEL: The narrow passage continues, its walls shimmering faintly with a silvery-yellow glow.
default: A glowing tunnel stretches before you, its walls lined with faintly pulsing crystals.

description.text: The tunnel stretches ahead, its walls radiating a soft, steady light.
Blue crystals embedded in the rock pulse faintly, casting shifting shadows.
The air is cool and dry, carrying a faint mineral scent.

exits.travel_text: You move forward through the glowing passage, the crystal light shifting around you with each step.

action.name: Bask in the light
action.tooltip: Bask in the light to recover MP.
action.disabled_tooltip: You've already absorbed the light here.

TUNNEL: The passage opens into a grotto, its walls glittering with luminous blue crystals.
default: You stand in a crystal grotto, its curved walls alive with shifting blue light.

description.text: Clusters of blue crystals jut from the stone, glowing softly.
Light refracts across the curved walls in shifting patterns.
Drops of water echo faintly, though no source is visible.

exits.travel_text: You take the left passage, its shimmering walls guiding you deeper into the cave.
You push straight through the grotto and continue into the glowing tunnel beyond.
You turn right and follow the passage as it curves deeper into the cave.

action.name: Bask in the light
action.tooltip: Bask in the light to recover MP.
action.disabled_tooltip: You've already absorbed the light here.

TUNNEL: The tunnel widens into a vast cavern, its glowing walls stretching into the distance.
default: A vast cavern surrounds you, its glowing walls rising into shadow far overhead.

description.text: The ceiling rises high above, lost in a haze of reflected light.
Crystal formations scatter light across the cavern like stars.
The silence here feels immense and heavy.

exits.travel_text: You head left, the crystal light trailing along the passage walls as you move.
You press straight ahead, the vast cavern receding behind you as the tunnel narrows.
You veer right and follow the tunnel as it winds away from the cavern.

action.name: Bask in the light
action.tooltip: Bask in the light to recover MP.
action.disabled_tooltip: You've already absorbed the light here.

TUNNEL: The glowing passage splits, each branch lit by the same eerie radiance.
default: The passage forks here, both branches glowing with the same steady, eerie light.

description.text: Both paths seem identical, their walls shimmering softly.
The light here flickers subtly, as if reacting to your presence.

exits.travel_text: You take the left branch, its walls glowing with the same steady luminescence.
You choose the right path, stepping into the glowing passage as it curves ahead.

action.name: Bask in the light
action.tooltip: Bask in the light to recover MP.
action.disabled_tooltip: You've already absorbed the light here.

TUNNEL: A faint glow intensifies ahead, revealing a luminous underground spring.
default: A luminous underground spring rests here, its waters glowing faintly with crystal light.

description.text: Clear water glows faintly, reflecting the crystal light.
Ripples shimmer with shifting hues of blue and gold.
The air feels strangely fresh here.

exits.travel_text: You leave the glowing spring behind and continue along the passage, the hum of crystal light surrounding you.

action.name: Drink from the spring
action.tooltip: Drink from the spring to recover HP and MP
action.disabled_tooltip: You already drank from the spring

TUNNEL: The passage leads to a raised stone altar, illuminated by concentrated crystal light.
default: A stone altar stands at the center of this chamber, bathed in concentrated crystal light.

description.text: The altar is carved from the same luminous stone as the cave.
Faint markings shimmer across its surface.
The air hums faintly with unseen energy.

exits.travel_text: You step away from the altar and continue deeper into the cave, the passage narrowing ahead.

action.name: Approach the altar
action.tooltip: Interact with the stone altar.
action.disabled_tooltip: You've already interacted with the altar.

TUNNEL: Light intensifies as you enter a chamber where crystals cluster densely along the walls.
default: A chamber dense with crystals surrounds you, small objects glinting among the stones.

description.text: The chamber glitters with reflected light from countless crystal surfaces.
Small objects lie scattered among the stones.
Something valuable might be hidden here.

exits.travel_text: You move on from the glittering chamber, the tunnel closing in as you press forward.

action.name: Bask in the light
action.tooltip: Bask in the light to recover MP.
action.disabled_tooltip: You've already absorbed the light here.

TUNNEL: Strange symbols glow faintly as you step into a hidden sanctum.
FOLLOW: The passage opens into a wider chamber filled with cloaked figures.
default: Carved symbols cover the walls of this hidden sanctum, each one pulsing with dim blue energy.

description.text: Symbols carved into the stone pulse with dim blue light.
The air feels charged, almost alive.
A low hum resonates through the chamber.

exits.travel_text: You leave the humming sanctum behind and continue along the passage, the symbols fading from view.

TUNNEL: The glowing passage abruptly ends in a smooth wall of stone.
default: The passage ends here in a solid wall of stone, the crystal light dimmer than before.

description.text: The light here is dimmer, as if fading.
The silence is absolute.

exits.travel_text: You turn and retrace your steps through the dimming passage, leaving the dead end behind.

action.name: Bask in the light
action.tooltip: Bask in the light to recover MP.
action.disabled_tooltip: You've already absorbed the light here.

TUNNEL: As you follow the tunnel you spot an exit up ahead.

description.text: You feel as though as you are being watched.

exits.travel_text: You make your way out of the Caves of Light.

SURFACE: A vast plateau stretches around you, where the light of the setting sun casts long shadows across uneven ground.
A vast plateau continues around you, where the sky glows dimly and the earth feels strangely hollow beneath your feet.
default: The land rises into a vast plateau, where the light of the setting sun casts long shadows across uneven ground.

description.text: The ground is dry and cracked, dotted with weathered stones and shallow depressions.
A faint wind carries dust across the plateau, whispering over the barren land.
The light here feels dimmer than it should, as if something beneath the ground is swallowing it.

exits.travel_text: You shift direction and move left across the plateau, the cracked earth stretching out unchanged before you.
You press on across the plateau, the dry ground crunching underfoot as the horizon remains flat and distant.
You veer right and continue across the barren expanse, dust rising faintly with each step.

action.name: Dig for valuables
action.tooltip: Someone left a shovel stuck in the cracked earth. The whole plateau was a burial ground once.
action.disabled_tooltip: Nothing left worth digging for.

SURFACE: You chance upon a small mausoleum demarcating the entrance to an underground catacomb.
default: A small mausoleum rises from the plateau here, its stone entrance descending into darkness below.

description.text: Cold air rises from below, carrying a faint, stale scent.
You hear something shifting beneath the earth.

exits.travel_text:
You descend into the catacombs, the light fading from your surroundings as you make your way down the stone steps. 
 In the dark, narrow tunnels stretch beneath the plateau.
You give the entrance a wide berth and continue across the plateau, leaving the mausoleum behind.

ENTRANCE: You descend into the catacombs, where narrow tunnels stretch beneath the plateau.
STEPS: Your steps echo as a dark tunnel stretches in front of you.
CATACOMB: Your steps echo as the dark tunnel stretches in front of you.
default: A narrow tunnel stretches around you, its old stone walls worn and crumbling in the dark.

description.text: The walls are lined with old stonework, worn and crumbling.
Dust drifts through the air with every step.
Faint echoes suggest you are not alone.

action.name: Search Ossuary
action.tooltip: Search the catacomb walls for anything left behind.
action.disabled_tooltip: You've already searched here.

exits.travel_text: You move deeper into the tunnel, the darkness pressing closer with every step.

STEPS: The underground passage splits, its branches vanishing into darkness.
CATACOMB: The underground passage splits, its branches vanishing into darkness.
default: The tunnel splits here, two passages disappearing separately into the dark.

description.text: Both tunnels look equally worn, their stones marked by age.
A faint draft moves through one of the passages.

action.name: Search Ossuary
action.tooltip: Search the catacomb walls for anything left behind.
action.disabled_tooltip: You've already searched here.

exits.travel_text: You take the left passage, your footsteps echoing into the dark ahead.
You take the right passage, the draft guiding you as you press deeper underground.

CATACOMB: You step into a circular chamber where something long forgotten was once worshipped.
default: A circular stone chamber opens around you, its pillars etched with old symbols and a faint glow seeping up from the floor.

description.text: Stone pillars ring the chamber, their surfaces etched with worn symbols.
A faint glow seeps up from cracks in the floor.
The air hums with lingering magic.

action.name: Search Ossuary
action.tooltip: Search the catacomb walls for anything left behind.
action.disabled_tooltip: You've already searched here.

exits.travel_text: You retrace your steps through the tunnels, climbing upward until dim light filters in from above. You emerge onto the plateau.

SURFACE: A crumbling altar rises among the graves, its stone darkened by time.
default: A crumbling stone altar stands here on the plateau, its surface darkened by time and long abandoned.

description.text: The altar is stained and cracked, its purpose long abandoned.
Offerings—now little more than dust—rest at its base.
You feel a faint unease standing here.

action.name: Examine the altar
action.tooltip: Take a closer look at the crumbling stone.
action.disabled_tooltip: You've already examined the altar.

exits.travel_text: You move left across the plateau, leaving the altar standing alone behind you.
You press on past the altar, continuing across the barren expanse.
You turn right and move on, the altar shrinking behind you in the flat landscape.

SURFACE: The land drops away sharply at the edge of the plateau.
EDGE: You follow the edge, the drop always just within sight.
default: The plateau ends abruptly here, the ground dropping away into darkness far below.

description.text: Far below, darkness swallows the landscape.
Loose stones tumble into the void when disturbed.
A cold wind rises from below.

exits.travel_text: You move along the rim, the sheer drop always close at your side.
You step back from the drop and move inward across the plateau, the edge receding behind you.

action.name: Peer over the edge
action.tooltip: Look over the edge.
action.disabled_tooltip: You've already searched here.

SURFACE: Rows of gravestones stretch across the plateau, their shadows long and uneven.
default: Rows of old gravestones stretch across the plateau around you, many broken or sunken into the cracked earth.

description.text: The graves are old, many broken or sunken into the earth.
The ground feels disturbed in places.
For a moment, you think something moved beneath the soil.

action.name: Enter the graveyard
action.tooltip: Move among the graves and see what stirs.
action.disabled_tooltip: You've already searched here.

exits.travel_text: You weave between the headstones and move left, leaving the graveyard behind.
You pass through the rows of graves and continue across the plateau.
You move right through the graveyard and continue on across the open ground.

CATACOMB: The tunnel narrows until it ends in a collapsed wall of stone.
default: The tunnel ends here in a collapsed wall of loose rubble, the silence total.

description.text: Loose rubble blocks the way forward.
The silence here feels suffocating.

exits.travel_text: You turn back into the tunnel, your footsteps retreating the way you came.

SURFACE: The terrain starts to get steeper as you approach the foothills of Mt. Legory.
EDGE: The terrain starts to get steeper as you approach the foothills of Mt. Legory.
default: You are at the foothills of Mt. Legory.

description.text: Mt. Legory looms ahead.

exits.travel_text: You make your way out of the Caves of Light.

SURFACE: The distant sound of music reaches you before anything else — a calliope tune, tinny and slightly off-key, drifting across the plateau. Then you see it: a cluster of striped tents rising improbably from the cracked earth.
You crest a low rise and stop short. A travelling circus has made camp on the plateau, its coloured pennants snapping in the wind, firelight glowing through canvas.
default: The striped tents of a travelling circus stand against the dimming sky.

description.text: The smell of sawdust and something animal drifts from the tents.
A painted sign reads: GILDED HOLLOW CIRCUS — ALL WELCOME.
You can hear laughter and the shuffle of an unseen crowd from within.

exits.travel_text: You leave the circus behind and continue across the plateau, the music fading with distance.

action.name: Enter the Circus
action.tooltip: Step inside the Gilded Hollow Circus.

SKIRT: The land begins to rise sharply as you step onto a winding mountain path, the air growing colder with each step.
UP: You continue your climb, the path narrowing as the slope steepens.
DOWN: You descend onto a more stable stretch of path, though the cold still bites at your skin.
default: A narrow path cuts across the mountainside here, edged by loose stones and swept by cold wind.

description.text: A narrow path cuts across the mountainside, edged by loose stones.
Cold wind sweeps down from above, carrying fine snow.
The air is thin, each breath slightly harder than the last.

exits.travel_text: You push upward along the narrow path, the air thinning as the slope grows steeper.
You leave the direct path and work your way around the mountainside, moving across the exposed terrain.

SKIRT: A dark opening in the rock offers shelter from the wind.
UP: You duck into a cave carved into the mountainside, escaping the harsh wind.
DOWN: The cave mouth appears below, a brief refuge from the cold.
default: A rough cave carved into the rock offers a break from the wind and the cold of the mountainside.

description.text: The cave walls are rough, offering some protection from the wind.
Faint echoes bounce within the hollow space.
The air is still, but bitterly cold.

exits.travel_text: You leave the cave and continue up the mountainside, the cold wind hitting you immediately.
You step out of the cave and move along the mountainside, skirting the slope.
You leave the cave and descend carefully along the path, the ground unsteady beneath you.

SKIRT: You move along the exposed mountainside, with little between you and the drop below.
UP: The slope steepens as you press upward along the mountainside.
DOWN: You descend carefully along the slope, each step uncertain.
default: The open mountainside stretches around you, the slope steep and the footing uncertain beneath the snow.

description.text: Snow gathers in patches along the uneven ground.
Loose stones shift underfoot.
The wind howls across the rock face.

exits.travel_text: You push on upward, each step uncertain against the loose rock and snow.
You traverse the slope sideways, picking your way carefully across the uneven terrain.
You turn and descend carefully, loose stones skittering away beneath your feet.

UP: At last, you reach the summit. The world stretches endlessly below, half-hidden beneath drifting clouds.
default: You stand at the summit of Mount Legory, the world spread far below beneath drifting clouds and relentless wind.

description.text: The peak is barren, covered in wind-scoured snow.
The sky feels vast and close at the same time.
The wind here is relentless.

exits.travel_text: You begin the descent, the wind still howling at your back as the peak rises above you once more.

SKIRT: A narrow ridge stretches ahead, with steep drops on either side.
UP: You step onto a precarious ridge, the wind pushing hard against you.
DOWN: The ridge widens slightly as you descend onto it.
default: A narrow ridge of rock runs beneath your feet, steep drops falling away on both sides.

description.text: The path is narrow, with little room for error.
Snow is swept thin by constant wind.
One misstep could send you tumbling.

exits.travel_text: You press forward along the ridge, the wind buffeting you as you climb.
You leave the narrow ridge and traverse the mountainside, finding slightly more stable ground.
You descend from the ridge carefully, keeping your balance against the relentless wind.

SKIRT: A natural stone arch rises from the mountainside, shaped by wind and time.
UP: You pass beneath a towering stone arch, its shadow offering brief shelter.
DOWN: A stone arch looms ahead as you descend, framing the path forward.
default: A natural stone arch rises from the mountainside here, worn smooth by centuries of wind and ice.

description.text: The arch stands against the wind, worn smooth over countless years.
Snow gathers in its sheltered base.
The wind whistles as it passes through the opening.

exits.travel_text: You pass beneath the arch and continue your climb, the stone frame falling behind you.
You move out from beneath the arch and continue along the mountainside, circling wider.
You descend past the arch, moving carefully along the slope.

default: You reach the entrance to a deep cave in the mountainside.

description.text: Hot air wafts out of the entrance.

exits.travel_text: You make your way inside, descending into the Core Caverns within.

DESCEND: The rock fractures beneath your path as heat rises from below, the air thick and suffocating.
DEPTHS: You press deeper into the cavern, the glow of magma intensifying with every step.
default: The stone around you is fractured and glowing, heat rising steadily from the depths below.

description.text: Cracks in the stone glow faintly with molten light.
Heat radiates from below, distorting the air.
Small stones shift and tumble into unseen depths.

exits.travel_text: You push deeper, the heat intensifying as the glow of magma grows brighter below.
You turn and climb back the way you came, the heat pressing against your back as you rise.

DEPTHS: A river of molten rock cuts across your path, its surface churning with unbearable heat.
default: A slow river of molten rock cuts across the cavern here, its surface churning and its light fierce.

description.text: Magma flows slowly but relentlessly, glowing bright orange.
The heat is intense, forcing you to keep your distance.
Occasional bursts of gas ripple across the surface.

exits.travel_text: You follow the edge of the flow, the molten rock churning beside you as you press deeper.
You search along the bank for a narrow point, carefully testing the ground before picking your way forward.

action.name: Try the shortcut
action.tooltip: A narrow path runs along the magma channel's edge.

DEPTHS: A narrow bridge of hardened basalt stretches across a glowing magma channel.
default: A narrow basalt bridge spans a channel of glowing magma here, cracked but holding against the heat.

description.text: The bridge is cracked but stable—for now.
Heat rises in waves from the magma below.
The stone creaks faintly under pressure.

exits.travel_text: You cross the basalt bridge with careful steps, the heat rising beneath you until you reach the other side.
You step back from the bridge and begin the climb upward, leaving the magma behind.

DEPTHS: The cavern opens into a chamber of smooth, black obsidian reflecting the glow of molten light.
default: Smooth obsidian walls surround you, reflecting the magma glow in distorted, shifting images.

description.text: The walls are glassy and sharp, reflecting distorted images.
Your reflection shifts unnaturally across the surfaces.
A deep rumble echoes through the chamber.

exits.travel_text: You move deeper into the cavern, the walls narrowing as the heat becomes almost unbearable.
You back away from the glassy walls and begin climbing upward, the distorted reflections fading behind you.

action.name: Study the reflection
action.tooltip: Examine your warped reflection in the obsidian.
action.disabled_tooltip: You've examined this place.

DEPTHS: The ground softens into thick ash, each step sinking slightly.
CORE: You reach a patch of ash blanketing the ground, the glow of the magma behind you.
default: A field of deep ash stretches around you, the ground unstable and the air thick with dry heat.

description.text: Ash drifts slowly through the air.
The ground is unstable, hiding cracks beneath the surface.
Heat pulses from below in uneven waves.

exits.travel_text: You wade through the ash, each step sinking slightly as you press further toward the core.
You turn away from the deep and begin climbing, the ash thinning as the heat slowly lessens.

CORE: The vast chamber stretches on as you reach a platform overlooking the heart of the mountain.
DEPTHS: You reach a opening at the mountain's heart—a vast chamber of churning magma and blinding light.
default: You stand at the heart of the mountain, surrounded by churning magma and the blinding light of the core.

description.text: Magma surges and collapses in an endless cycle.
The heat is overwhelming, pressing against your entire body.
The air vibrates with raw, destructive energy.

exits.travel_text: You push forward despite the overwhelming heat, drawn toward the churning magma at the mountain's heart.
You pull back from the core, retreating into an opening on the side of the chamber as the roar of magma fades slightly behind you.

DEPTHS: The passage narrows into a low tunnel, forcing you to duck as the walls press close on either side.
default: A low, winding tunnel cuts through the basalt here, the air hot and close.

description.text: The tunnel walls are scored with old chisel marks.
The passage is narrow, the ceiling barely clearing your head.
Somewhere ahead, heat pulses rhythmically through the stone.

exits.travel_text: You squeeze through the low passage, the basalt walls brushing your shoulders before the cavern opens again.

DEPTHS: A cascade of molten rock blocks your path — a waterfall of lava pouring into a glowing pool below.
default: A roar of cascading molten rock fills the chamber — a waterfall of lava pouring into a glowing pool below.
A curtain of lava spills from a high ledge into a churning pool, casting everything in violent orange light.

description.text: The lava falls in a steady curtain, impossibly bright.
The roar is deafening up close, drowning out your thoughts.
Flecks of molten rock drift upward on the heat.

exits.travel_text: You back away from the roaring falls, the light fading as you follow a different tunnel.

MINE: The rails lead you into the remains of a what might've been an unloading structure. The collapsed stone walls reveal the remains of a long forgotten settlement.
DEPTHS: The cavern widens into the remains of a settlement — crumbling stone arches and collapsed walls half-buried under ash.
default: Broken stone structures rise from the ash here, the remnants of a civilization long abandoned.

description.text: The stonework is massive and crude, decorated with tusked figures.
Collapsed arches and doorframes jut from the ash at odd angles.
Something was carved into the stonework, now too worn to read.
A smell of old ash and something older still lingers here.

exits.travel_text: You pick through the collapsed stonework, ash rising around your feet, before emerging on the far side.
You leave the ruins behind and continue deeper into the cavern.

action.name: Read the inscription
action.tooltip: One section of stonework still has legible Troll script.

DEPTHS: The cavern opens onto a vast ledge overlooking a sea of slow lava — and rising from it, a colossal stone figure, half-submerged.
CORE: Deeper into the chamber, you spot a huge tusked statue, half tipped over into a pool of lava.
default: A giant stone-and-metal statue rises from the lava here, its lower half long since submerged in the slow creep of molten rock.
The massive statue's tusked form looms, it's lower half submerged in molten rock.

description.text: The tusked statue is ancient — likely carved by Troll hands, enormous and rough-hewn.
Its upper half still reaches above the lava, one arm raised as if in warning.
The lava creeps slowly around the base, swallowing more each year.

exits.travel_text: You skirt around the edge of the pool and walk past the statue, the heat building with every step.
You turn from the statue and find an opening on the side of the chamber and delve into it.

action.name: Examine the statue
action.tooltip: Get a closer look at the ancient Troll statue from the ledge.
action.disabled_tooltip: You've already examined the statue.

MINE: The mines stretch farther still, the mineshaft spliting off again as cavern widens.
DEPTHS: You pass through a carved archway into a system of old mining shafts, the tunnels braced with scorched timber.
default: Mining tunnels branch in several directions here, very old infrastructure reclaimed for new purposes.

description.text: Newer markings cover the old ones — someone has reclaimed this place.
The smell of something metallic and warm drifts from the deeper shafts.
A distant clang of metal echoes from somewhere in the dark.

exits.travel_text: You press deeper into the tunnels, the walls closing in and the air growing heavier.
You follow the cart rails into a tunnel, delving deeper into the mines.

action.name: Mine for ore
action.tooltip: Pick up an ancient pickaxe and try to mine a seam for treasure.
action.disabled_tooltip: Nothing left to mine with.

DEPTHS: The path opens beside a series of glowing mineral pools, steam rising from water heated by the mountain itself.
default: Steaming pools of mineral water sit in shallow basins of pale rock, fed by heat from deep below.

description.text: The water glows faintly orange from the mineral content.
Steam drifts across the pools in slow, curling waves.
The air here is damp rather than dry, a rare relief from the cavern's usual heat.
The pools bubble gently, warm but not scalding at the edges.

exits.travel_text: You leave the warmth of the springs behind and press further into the cavern.

action.name: Soak in the springs
action.tooltip: Rest in the hot springs to recover HP and MP.

DEPTHS: The tunnels open abruptly onto a wide, low cavern — and you realize you are standing at the edge of a settlement.
TOWN: The tunnels end in a wide, low cavern — and you realize the Lizardmen have led you to a full-blown settlement.
default: Lizal-Town fills the wide cavern, its low stone structures and firelit passages alive with the movement of Lizal inhabitants.

description.text: Low stone buildings line the paths, carved directly from the cavern walls.
Lizals move through the settlement with purpose, sparing you wary looks.
The smell of cooked meat and hot metal drifts from deeper in the settlement.
Firelight flickers from a dozen carved alcoves.

exits.travel_text: You leave the settlement behind and return to the dark passages of the Core Cavern.

action.name: Enter the town
action.tooltip: Visit Lizal-Town.

MINE: The rails abruptly end at the entrance of a chamber where dull light streams down from an exit above.
DEPTHS: The tunnel opens up into a chamber where dull light streams down from an exit above.
CORE: At the very end of the chamber, you find an opening from which dull light pours down from above.

description.text: You feel as though as you are being watched.

exits.travel_text: You make your way out of the Caves of Light.

SWAMP: A thick white fog swallows the landscape as you step into the swamp, obscuring everything beyond a few steps.
DEEP: You push through the mist, but nothing changes—the swamp stretches endlessly in all directions.
default: You stand in the foggy marsh, shallow water pooling around your feet and thick mist obscuring everything beyond a few steps.

description.text: Shallow water pools around your feet, hidden beneath layers of mud.
The fog dulls all sound, leaving only your own movements.
Shapes seem to move just beyond your vision.

exits.travel_text: You push forward through the fog and the shallow water, each step pulling against the mud beneath.
You turn and push back through the fog, retracing your steps as best you can.

DEEP: Your foot finds something solid beneath the water—a submerged path, barely visible through the fog.
default: Old stones form a path just beneath the murky water here, appearing and disappearing unpredictably.

description.text: Old stones form a path beneath the murky water.
The path vanishes and reappears unpredictably.
You are not sure if it leads anywhere at all.

exits.travel_text: You continue carefully along the submerged stones, testing each step before moving forward.
You leave the path and step into the murky water, the ground immediately less certain beneath you.

SWAMP: Dark, twisted trees loom from the fog, their shapes barely visible.
DEEP: The trees close in tighter, their forms warped and unnatural.
default: Dark, gnarled trees press close around you, their trunks bent at impossible angles and their roots rising from the water.

description.text: The trunks bend at impossible angles.
Roots rise from the water like grasping fingers.
You feel watched.

exits.travel_text: You force your way between the gnarled trunks, roots snagging at your feet as you press deeper.
You back away through the twisted trees, moving slowly to avoid the grasping roots.

DEEP: The ground gives way to a wide expanse of still, dark water.
default: A wide expanse of perfectly still, dark water stretches before you, its depth impossible to read.

description.text: The surface is perfectly still, like glass.
You cannot see how deep it goes.
Something disturbs the water far from you.

exits.travel_text: You move carefully along the edge of the still water, keeping to the firmer ground.
You step into the dark water, its stillness broken around you as you wade forward.

SWAMP: Tall reeds emerge from the fog, swaying despite the still air.
DEEP: The reeds close around you, their soft rustling forming indistinct whispers.
default: Tall reeds surround you on all sides, their rustling carrying sounds almost like voices.

description.text: The reeds brush softly against you as you pass.
The sound almost resembles voices.
You almost understand what they're saying.

exits.travel_text: You let the sound draw you forward, pressing deeper through the swaying reeds.
You push through the reeds without listening, focusing on finding firmer ground.

DEEP: A crumbling shrine emerges from the fog, half-sunken into the swamp.
default: A crumbling stone shrine rises half-sunken from the swamp here, its carvings worn beyond recognition.

description.text: Stone carvings are worn beyond recognition.
The structure leans, slowly sinking into the mud.
It feels like this place should not be found.

exits.travel_text: You circle the shrine carefully, probing its crumbling structure before moving on.
You turn from the shrine and move quickly back into the fog, the structure disappearing behind you.

DEEP: The fog thickens until even the ground beneath you fades from view.
default: The fog is total here—you can barely see your own hands, and every sound is swallowed by the mist.

description.text: You can barely see your own hands.
Sound is completely muffled.
You are no longer sure which way you came from.

exits.travel_text: You press forward blindly, one hand outstretched, hoping the fog will thin.
You stop and wait, listening to the muffled silence until some sense of direction returns.

SWAMP: The outline of a broken boat appears through the fog.
DEEP: You almost miss it—a half-sunken boat drifting silently in the water.
default: A half-sunken wooden boat lists in the water nearby, its hull rotted and waterlogged.

description.text: The wood is rotted and waterlogged.
It looks like it hasn't moved in years.
Someone must have come this way before.

exits.travel_text: You wade closer to the wreck and look it over, searching the waterlogged hull before moving on.
You leave the broken boat behind and continue through the fog.

SWAMP: Through the suffocating fog, sharp geometric shapes emerge—perfect black cubes stacked into impossible structures.
RUINS: The silent geometry of the ruins surrounds you once more, their surfaces humming faintly with power.
default: You stand at the edge of the Arcmat Ruins, where the swamp fog ends and precise black geometric structures begin.

description.text: Massive onyx blocks form walls of precise, unnatural symmetry.
Thin streams of violet energy arc between the stones.
The fog does not enter here.

exits.travel_text: You step through the threshold, the fog cutting away as the black geometry of the ruins closes around you.
You step back through the threshold, and the fog rushes in immediately, swallowing the ruins behind you.

RUINS: A vast hall stretches ahead, its walls partially collapsed—yet the fallen cubes hang suspended in midair.
default: A vast hall surrounds you, its walls fragmented and floating, bound together by threads of violet energy.

description.text: Onyx cubes float silently where walls once stood.
Energy threads bind the structure together despite its fragmentation.
The air vibrates faintly, like a held breath.

exits.travel_text: You move through the hall, navigating between floating blocks, and press deeper into the ruins.
You study the suspended cubes up close, then continue deeper into the ruins.

RUINS: A narrow corridor lined with glowing inscriptions stretches into the distance.
default: A narrow corridor surrounds you, its walls covered in glowing symbols that shift whenever you look away.

description.text: Symbols carved into the walls shift subtly when not directly observed.
The glyphs pulse with a steady violet glow.
You cannot decipher their meaning.

exits.travel_text: You walk the length of the corridor, the glowing glyphs shifting at the edges of your vision as you pass.
You run your fingers along the pulsing inscriptions, then press on through the corridor.

RUINS: A chamber filled with intricate moving parts reveals itself, each piece rotating with silent precision.
default: Interlocking mechanisms fill the chamber around you, their components turning in silent, endless motion.

description.text: Interlocking rings and cubic components shift endlessly.
Energy flows through the mechanisms like blood through veins.
The system appears self-sustaining.

exits.travel_text: You watch the intricate components turn in silence before carefully moving on.
You pick your way through the moving parts and continue deeper into the ruins.

RUINS: The space opens upward into a vast atrium, where entire sections of structure float freely.
default: An open atrium rises around you, cubic stones drifting slowly through the air, held by unseen forces.

description.text: Cubic stones drift slowly through the air, held by unseen forces.
Purple light radiates from the gaps between them.
Gravity feels uncertain here.

exits.travel_text: You step out onto the drifting stones, moving carefully from block to block until you reach the far side.
You pull back from the atrium and find another path through the ruins.

RUINS: A concentrated stream of violet energy flows through a central channel, humming with immense power.
default: A channel of raw violet energy runs through the center of this space, crackling with unstable, immense power.

description.text: Raw mana pulses visibly between the onyx blocks.
The air crackles with unstable energy.
Standing too close makes your skin tingle painfully.

exits.travel_text: You follow the stream of energy as it leads you inward, the crackling power growing stronger with every step.
You move back from the conduit and continue through the ruins, the prickling sensation in your skin fading slowly.

RUINS: Rows of carved surfaces line the chamber, each filled with dense, unreadable writing.
default: Dense, shifting script covers every surface of this chamber, layer upon layer of indecipherable writing.

description.text: The walls are covered in layers of indecipherable script.
Some symbols rearrange themselves slowly.
The knowledge here feels vast—and unreachable.

exits.travel_text: You spend a long moment trying to decipher the shifting script, then move on through the ruins.
You step out of the scriptorium and continue deeper into the ruins.

CORE: At the heart of the ruins, a perfect geometric structure pulses with overwhelming magical energy.
default: You stand before the Core Nexus—a perfect geometric structure at the heart of the ruins, pulsing with overwhelming energy.

description.text: Cubes align and shift in precise, repeating patterns.
Energy arcs violently between them, forming unstable shapes.
This feels like the origin of something vast.

exits.travel_text: You step closer to the pulsing structure, the energy arcing around you as the air vibrates with its power.
You back away from the nexus and retreat through the ruins, the geometric patterns fading behind you.
